name: Storylane Interactive Demo Platform API
what_it_does: Storylane interactive product demo platform REST API for B2B SaaS teams to create screenshot-based and HTML-capture interactive demos, track prospect engagement, and personalize demos with AI-powered tooltips and guided flows for sales and marketing teams. Enables AI agents to manage demo project creation and configuration for demo content automation, handle demo sharing and embed code generation for distribution automation, access prospect engagement and view analytics for buyer intelligence automation, retrieve step completion and drop-off analytics for demo optimization automation, manage AI-powered tooltip and hotspot creation for guided demo automation, handle demo personalization variable substitution for account-based automation, access CRM lead routing and HubSpot/Salesforce integration for sales handoff automation, retrieve team workspace and collaboration management for demo library automation, manage demo template creation for reusable content automation, and integrate Storylane with HubSpot, Salesforce, Marketo, and marketing platforms for end-to-end interactive demo workflow.
use_cases: Creating interactive demos from sales content automation agents
Tracking prospect engagement from buyer intelligence agents
Personalizing demos at scale from account-based sales agents
Routing demo-qualified leads from conversion automation agents
not_for: Live product sandboxes for POC (use TestBox or Demostack)
Engineering-coded custom demo environments (use Reprise for developer demos)
Video product demos (use Loom or Vidyard for video)
best_when: A B2B SaaS sales or marketing team wanting AI agents to automate interactive demo creation, AI-guided tooltip flows, account-based personalization, and prospect engagement tracking through Storylane's AI-powered demo platform.
avoid_when: HTML CAPTURE VS SCREENSHOT DEMO LIMITATIONS: Storylane supports both HTML-capture demos (more interactive) and screenshot-based demos (faster to create); HTML capture demos may have rendering differences from production app; automated demo selection must match capture method to demo fidelity requirement. PERSONALIZATION TOKEN POPULATION FOR AUTOMATED DEMOS: Storylane personalization tokens (company name, user name, etc.) require population at demo share time; automated personalized demo links must include token values in share URL; automated demo link without token population sends generic non-personalized demo to account-specific prospect. AI TOOLTIP GENERATION QUALITY FOR SPECIALIZED PRODUCTS: Storylane AI-powered tooltip generation uses screen content analysis; automated AI tooltip creation for specialized domain products may generate generic descriptions; automated AI tooltip without human review creates low-quality guidance for complex product workflows.

auth.notes: Storylane uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2021 by Nalin Senthamil and Prasanna Krishnamurthy. Backed by Sequoia Surge, Accel, Emergent Ventures ($16M+ raised). Products: Interactive demo builder, AI tooltips, personalization, analytics, CRM integration, Flows. Integrations: HubSpot, Salesforce, Marketo, Slack, Zapier. GDPR. Serves 3,000+ B2B companies. Competes with Navattic, Reprise, and Demostack for interactive demos.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Starter free (1 demo, 5 screenshots); limited features
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($40/mo), Growth ($100/mo, unlimited demos), Enterprise (custom); annual discount
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Sequoia backed. Free tier (1 demo). Per-seat subscription from $40/mo. Annual discount.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; demo and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for view, completion, and form events

known_agent_gotchas: PERSONALIZATION TOKEN ENCODING IN SHARE URL: Storylane personalization tokens are passed as URL query parameters in demo share links; automated personalized demo distribution must URL-encode token values; automated personalization URL with unencoded special characters creates broken demo link or token parsing error

DEMO VIEW vs DEMO LEAD DISTINCTION IN ANALYTICS: Storylane distinguishes demo views (anonymous visitors) from leads (identified via form or email); automated engagement analytics must separately count views and leads; automated lead conversion rate using view count as denominator creates inflated conversion if lead forms capture only a subset of viewers

FLOWS vs DEMOS PRODUCT DISTINCTION: Storylane has two products — Demos (standalone interactive demos) and Flows (in-app guided tours on live product); automated integration must target correct product API; automated demo management API on Flows product creates endpoint not found errors

TEAM SEAT MANAGEMENT FOR API KEY ATTRIBUTION: Storylane API keys are associated with team member seats; automated API usage attributed to specific team member seat; automated API key management must track seat assignment; automated API key without active seat creates authentication error

DEMO ANALYTICS AGGREGATION PERIOD: Storylane analytics data aggregates engagement by default aggregation periods; automated reporting must specify date range parameters; automated reporting without date range returns platform-default aggregation that may not match reporting cadence
agent_readiness.security_notes: Interactive demo. GDPR. API key. US. Demo engagement and prospect data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Interactive demo. GDPR. API key. US. Demo and prospect data.
